landing.title: Make {colorHigh} Financial Plans
landing.subtitle: Kalkul helps professional advisors create, visualise and share financial plans with their clients.
landing.betaAccessTitle: Get early and free access to Kalkul Beta today!
landing.betaAccessDescription: Join an exclusive group of forward-thinking professionals who are helping us shape the future of independent finance.
landing.betaDiscountText: Beta users will receive an exclusive discount at public launch.

getStarted.title: Getting started with Kalkul
getStarted.subtitle: This guide covers all the essentials to get you started quickly and confidently.
getStarted.keepPageOpen: The Kalkul app and Discord links will open in a new tab, we recommend keeping this page open so you can come back here for guidance.

whatIsKalkul.title: What is Kalkul?
whatIsKalkul.content: Kalkul is a financial planning application designed specifically for independent financial advisors. It empowers you to create, manage, and share comprehensive portfolios with your clients. Unlike institution-tied platforms, Kalkul's independence allows you to add investments from any source, giving you the freedom to build truly unified, platform-independent portfolios tailored to each client's needs.

isFree.title: Is Kalkul free to use?
isFree.content: Kalkul is currently in free Beta while we put the finishing touches on the platform. As an early user, you'll get free access and your feedback will directly shape our product—helping us fix bugs, prioritize features, and build exactly what independent financial advisors need.
isFree.laterNote: → Later this year, we'll introduce paid plans to support Kalkul's continued development as truly independent software. As a thank you for your valuable input, all Beta users will receive an exclusive discount when we launch publicly.

whyDiscord.title: Why should I join Discord?
whyDiscord.content: Discord is a communication platform that allows people in our growing community to interact through text, voice, and video. It's the best place to ask questions, share insights with fellow advisors, and provide feedback that shapes Kalkul's development. Plus, our team is active daily to help solve any issues you encounter.
whyDiscord.newToDiscord: → New to Discord? No problem—creating a free account takes just seconds.

createClient.title: Create your first client
createClient.intro: To get started, you'll need to create a client profile. It's quick and easy—just provide:

requirements.name: Your client's name
requirements.birthdate: Your client's birthdate (used for age calculations)
requirements.email: Your client's email address (optional, for portfolio sharing)

createClient.afterCreation: Once this is done, the client profile will appear on the homepage when you're logged in. You can create as many clients as you need.

createPortfolio.title: Create your first portfolio
createPortfolio.intro: Now that you've created a client profile, it's time to create a portfolio. Think of a portfolio as a collection of investments with key parameters like currency and time horizon.
createPortfolio.tip: → Use portfolios to organize investments for each of your clients. For example, you can create separate portfolios organized by investment goals, time horizons, or currencies.
createPortfolio.requirements: To create a new portfolio, you'll need to:

steps.name: Provide a portfolio name
steps.currency: Choose the default currency (with corresponding inflation rate)
steps.horizon: Define the investment horizon using either specific dates, a set time period (like 20 or 30 years) or based on your client's age

createPortfolio.multiplePortfolios: You can create as many portfolios as you want for each client. All the portfolios for a specific client will be listed on the client's page.

addInvestment.title: Add your first investment
addInvestment.intro: Now that you've created a portfolio for your client, it's time to add your first investment. An investment can be any security or financial instrument.
addInvestment.requirements: To add a new investment, you'll need to set:

steps.name: Investment name - used to identify the investment in charts and reports
steps.type: Type (optional) - such as 'Common Stock', 'ETF', 'Bonds', 'Mutual Fund', etc.
steps.apy: APY (Annual Percentage Yield) - the expected annual return rate for this investment
steps.fees: Investment fees structure - any associated costs or management fees

addInvestment.importTip: → For faster setup, you can use the "Import data" function to automatically populate certain investment details using an ISIN number or ticker symbol.
addInvestment.afterCreation: Once you've entered these details, the investment will be added to your client's portfolio.

addTransactions.title: Add transactions in each investment
addTransactions.intro: Once you've set up an investment, the final step is to add transactions (deposits or withdrawals) for that investment.
addTransactions.requirements: To add a new transaction, you'll need to:

steps.type: Select the transaction type - deposit or withdrawal
steps.frequency: Choose frequency - one-time (default) or recurring using the "Recurring" switch
steps.label: Add a label - used to identify the transaction in charts and reports
steps.date: Set the transaction date - either using the calendar or based on your client's age

addTransactions.afterCreation: Once you've entered these details, the transaction will appear in the corresponding investment card on the portfolio page sidebar.

reviewPresent.title: Review and present a portfolio
reviewPresent.intro: Once you've built a complete portfolio with investments and transactions, Kalkul offers multiple visualization options to present compelling insights to your clients, whether in person or during online meetings.

focusSection.title: Focus on what matters
focusSection.focusChart: Under the menu button, select "Focus in chart" for any investment to hide all others and spotlight that specific investment in the visualization.
focusSection.hideInvestments: Alternatively, you can hide a specific investment from the chart when it's not relevant to your presentation.
focusSection.hideTransactions: You can also hide individual transactions and watch the chart update in real-time, making it easy to show clients how specific contributions or withdrawals impact their overall portfolio performance.

inflationSection.title: Adjust for inflation
inflationSection.description: Use the "Show inflation" switch to automatically adjust all investment and transaction values for inflation (based on the portfolio settings), showing real purchasing power over time.
inflationSection.note: → Note: When enabled, all charts show inflation-adjusted values with a subtle grey line indicating the original, non-adjusted amounts.

fullscreenSection.title: Go fullscreen
fullscreenSection.description: Each chart has a fullscreen mode, allowing you to use all available screen space to visualize the details of a specific chart. You can even show or hide the sidebar while in fullscreen mode.
fullscreenSection.tip: → This feature is particularly useful for presentations on smaller screens, projectors, or in online meetings.

sharePortfolio.title: Share a portfolio
sharePortfolio.intro: Kalkul provides two powerful sharing options for your client portfolios: online links or custom PDF exports.

linkSharing.title: Link sharing
linkSharing.description: Enable link sharing to generate a view-only portfolio link for your client (no sign up required). Any portfolio updates you make will automatically update in real-time under the same link.
linkSharing.note: → People with the link can view and interact with the portfolio (show/hide data, hover for details, use fullscreen mode, etc.) but cannot make any changes.

pdfExport.title: PDF export
pdfExport.description: For offline presentations, export a customized PDF file. Kalkul creates a professionally formatted horizontal A4 layout optimized for both printing and digital viewing.
pdfExport.note: → You can include portfolio breakdown charts at specific key dates of your choice.

conclusion.thanks: That's it—thanks for following along! We hope Kalkul makes your financial planning more efficient and effective.

feedback.title: Let us know your thoughts!
feedback.description: As one of our first users, your feedback directly shapes our product—helping us fix bugs, prioritize features, and build exactly what independent advisors need. Found an issue or something that could be better? Love something in particular? Have a feature idea or request? Tell us!

editInvestment.foundMatchingProducts: {numProducts, plural, one {We found one product matching your search and portfolio currency ({currency})} other {We found # products matching your search and portfolio currency ({currency})}}
editInvestment.matchingProductExplanation: Products in other currencies are not shown. APY will be calculated on a 10y basis
editInvestment.isin: Please enter an ISIN number or a ticker symbol
editInvestment.isinExplanation: An International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) is a unique twelve-digit code that is assigned to every security issuance in the world.
editInvestment.tickerExplanation: A ticker symbol, also known as a stock symbol, is a unique combination of letters assigned to publicly traded companies on stock exchanges.
editInvestment.errorFetchingIsin: There was an error during fetching ISIN number
editInvestment.noProductsFound: No products matching your search and portfolio currency ({currency})
editInvestment.noImportDataFound: No import data found, please enter manually
editInvestment.foundMoreInOtherCurrencies: We found {numMatching} more matching products in other currencies
editInvestment.matchingButNotPortfolioCurrency: These are matching your search but not your portfolio currency
editInvestment.noProductsInCurrencyButFoundInOthers: We didn't find any product matching your search in {currency}, but we found {numMatching} matching products in other currencies
editInvestment.matchingSearchButNotCurrency: These are matching your search but not your portfolio currency.
editInvestment.tryDifferentSearch: Please try a different search term or add the investment manually
editInvestment.deleteInvestmentWarning: This investment will be deleted permanently. There's no undo.
editInvestment.terHelper: Annual total fund cost – includes management, operation and administration.
editInvestment.entryFeeHelper: Fee paid when entering the investment – usually once or ongoing.
editInvestment.exitFeeHelper: Fee charged when withdrawing the investment – can be fixed or percentage.
editInvestment.managementFeeHelper: Regular fee for investment management – usually annual percentage of asset value.

editPortfolio.deletePortfolioWarning: This portfolio and all the investments it contains will be deleted permanently. There’s no undo.

editTransaction.deleteConfirmWarning: Are you sure you want to delete?

helpBox.addClientText: Press the "Add client" button to create your first client
helpBox.clientListExplanation: This page will list all your clients. You can access it anytime by clicking on the Kalkul logo in the top-left corner of the screen. Once you set up your first client, you will be able to create an investment portfolio for this client.
helpBox.addPortfolioText: Press the "Add portfolio" button to add a first portfolio for this client
helpBox.portfolioExplanation: A portfolio will contain specific investments. Use portfolios to organise investments for your client. You can create as many portfolios as you want for each client. All the portfolios for this client will be listed on the client's page.
helpBox.addInvestmentText: Press the "Add investment" button to add a first investment in this portfolio
helpBox.investmentExplanation: You can create as many investments as you want in a client portfolio. Once you have at least one investment set up, this page will display detailed information about the whole portfolio.
helpBox.addTransactionText: In the left sidebar, press the "Add transaction" button within the desired investment card.
helpBox.transactionExplanation: Transactions define the amount of money that is deposited or withdrawn for this specific investment over time.

welcome.subject: Welcome to Kalkul!
welcome.previewText: Thank you for being an early adopter of Kalkul! 🚀
welcome.title: Thank you for being an early adopter of Kalkul! 🚀
welcome.introText: You're joining an exclusive group of forward-thinking professionals who are helping us build the future of independent financial planning.
welcome.expertiseText: As one of our first users, your feedback directly shapes our product—helping us fix bugs, prioritize features, and build exactly what independent advisors need. Found an issue or something that could be better? Love something in particular? Have a feature idea or request? Tell us!
welcome.rewardsText: As a beta user, you're getting early and free access to our financial planning tool. Yes, we're still polishing things up, but that's exactly why your presence here is so valuable. As a thank you for being an early adopter and helping us make Kalkul better, you will receive an exclusive discount at public launch.
welcome.step2: Create your first client portfolio and explore our features
welcome.step3: Join our {discordLink} community to share your first impressions and feedback
welcome.thankYou: Thank you for believing in what we're building.

newsletter2025September.subject: Back to business with Kalkul
newsletter2025September.title: Summer's over – back to business! 🚀
newsletter2025September.introText: While you were (hopefully) taking a well-deserved break, our team has been hard at work making Kalkul even better for you.
newsletter2025September.betaSignupHeading: Beta sign up is now open!
newsletter2025September.betaSignupText: We're excited to announce that beta sign-ups are now open to everybody! If you've been waiting to get early access and help shape the future of our product, now's your chance.
newsletter2025September.expertiseText: As one of our first users, your feedback directly shapes our product—helping us fix bugs, prioritize features, and build exactly what independent advisors need. Found an issue or something that could be better? Love something in particular? Have a feature idea or request? Tell us!
newsletter2025September.importDataText: We just added an "Import data" feature when adding investments to portfolios. Simply search by ISIN or ticker symbol to automatically populate the investment name and APY. Give it a try and let us know what you think!
newsletter2025September.closingText: Wishing you a wonderful summer as we continue building Kalkul together!
